import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.claude/skills/jtool/scripts/src'\)

print\('测试 devices_scan 返回值:'\)

    print\(f'{dev_type.name}: {devices}'\)
    print\(f'  数量: {len\(devices\)}, 唯一值: {len\(set\(devices\)\)}'\)
")
